problem: How are trauma and stress responses inherited epigenetically across generations?
hypothesis: Combining Telomerase activation/inhibition in target cells with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: In vitro cell culture assay with 21 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
